# Template — Internal Audit Report (ISO 27001 §9.2)

**Version:** 1.0.0 (outline)  
**Date:** 2026-06-08  
**Owner:** ISMS Lead  
**Use:** ACT-011, IA-2026-01 and subsequent audits  
**Status:** ✅ Programme outline · 🎯 First audit execution pending

---

## Report metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Audit ID | IA-YYYY-## |
| Audit title | |
| Planned window | YYYY-Q# |
| Report date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Lead auditor | (must be independent of audited function) |
| Auditee / process owner | |
| Criteria | ISO 27001:2022 Annex A · Magna Carta MC-### · SOC 2 CC# |

---

## 1. Executive summary

- **Overall conclusion:** Conforming · Conforming with minor gaps · Non-conforming (major)
- **Scope summary:** (domains, systems, sample period)
- **Finding counts:** Major __ · Minor __ · Observation __ · Opportunity __

---

## 2. Audit scope and criteria

| Domain | In scope? | Sample size | Evidence sources |
|--------|-----------|-------------|------------------|
| Access management | | | |
| Change & release | | | |
| Incident & IR | | | |
| Privacy & DSR | | | |
| Supplier & DPA | | | |
| BCP & backup | | | |
| AI governance | | | |
| Magna Carta programme | | | |

**Exclusions and limitations:** (e.g. Tranc3 upstream not physically audited)

---

|------------|------------------|-------------------|---------|------------------------|
| | | | | |

|------------|------------------|---------|-------------------|
| | | | |

|------------|-------|-------------|
| | | |

| Finding ID | Topic | Suggestion |
|------------|-------|------------|
| | | |

## 4. Corrective action plan (CAPA)

| Finding ID | Action | Owner | Due date | ACT-### link |
|------------|--------|-------|----------|--------------|
| | | | | |

CAPA verification due within **90 days** per [INTERNAL-AUDIT-PROGRAMME.md](../governance/INTERNAL-AUDIT-PROGRAMME.md) §4.

---

## 5. Positive practices (optional)

Document controls operating effectively — useful for management review and SOC 2 narratives.

---

## 6. Distribution and follow-up

| Recipient | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| ISMS Lead | Programme ownership |
| Management | Management review input |
| Process owners | CAPA execution |
| DPO | Privacy-related findings |

- [ ] Findings logged in [COMPLIANCE-ACTION-TRACKER.md](../compliance/COMPLIANCE-ACTION-TRACKER.md)
- [ ] Management review slot scheduled
- [ ] Follow-up audit date set (if major NC)
